description: Deke Shaw and Daisy have an awkward reunion in the Lighthouse as Deke boasts about his newfound tech wealth and Daisy hints at the team's recent space adventures. Deke learns Fitz has been found and missed out on rescue efforts, causing him to feel slighted. Mack arrives, asking for Deke's help in cracking alien technology.

transcript.line: Check the scoring on the engine housings. We hit some bumps on re-entry.
Yes Mam.
Thanks.
Hey.
Hey.
I just wanted to check in, you know. The weirdness with the Coulson... whatever. You good?
Yeah, I'm good. How are you? How's the stab wound?
Oh, I'm... I'm fine. The guy just nicked me, so...
Hmm.
Nice shoes. You picked up some style in the past year. You look good.
I mean, they're vintage ‘88 Jordans. Never worn, super rare, so, you know, I guess they're cool, but... And Jordan... I mean... are you kidding me? Like, what a guy.
I mean, you know who Jordan is, right?
Do I know... He changed everything. He's a revolutionary. ‘Cause he... invented shoes.
Yeah.

'Cause the thing about innovators, you know... I don't know if we're born or we become, but it's... It's usually stuff that the Herd just isn't really ready for. It's like I tell VCs, you know, sometimes you just got to surf that Paradigm Shift.
What?
Oh, no, you... You probably don't know. Uh, I'm... I'm super rich now.
Like, real dollars?
Yeah, I started a company.
What did you do? Like, uh, invent a new body spray or something?
Yeah.
Cool.

No. No, no. I-I-I started a tech company, silly. That's... You know, you were actually... a really big inspiration. You encouraged me to go out there and figure out what the world was all about. Well, it turns out that the world is all about making money. And old Deke is very good at it.
You're doing the... The third-person thing? Okay.

Listen, forget about me. I-I want to hear more about your space adventure. You and Fitz-Simmons were poking around the galaxy for the last year, and grandma and grandpa are still in space, so that's cool.
What have you been told?
Well, Mack was pretty cagey with the details... You know, the Director and his secrets, so... Fill me in.
I mean, it's a long story, but the detail that counts is that we found him. We found Fitz, so...
Found Fitz? What are you talking about?
